Our developments

Distinctive homes in carefully chosen locations.

Every Kingsvale development is shaped around setting, longevity and the quiet details that make a home feel settled from the first day.

Current collection

Explore our homes

Now selling

The Ridings

Chandlers Ford, Hampshire

The Ridings is a composed private enclave designed around generous plots, mature planting and quietly confident architecture. Each home pairs traditional proportions with contemporary glazing, calm interiors and flexible family space.

Homes
14 detached homes
Bedrooms
4 and 5 bedrooms
Guide
From GBP 895,000
View development

Coming soon

Meadow Green

Bramshaw, Hampshire

Meadow Green brings a small collection of crafted homes to a leafy Hampshire village, with pitched rooflines, tactile materials and gardens planned for quiet everyday living.

Homes
9 village homes
Bedrooms
3, 4 and 5 bedrooms
Guide
Register for release
View development

Final homes

Oakdene Heights

Shalford, Surrey

Oakdene Heights is a limited collection of contemporary family homes designed to sit lightly in a wooded Surrey setting, balancing sculptural architecture with privacy and long views.

Homes
6 contemporary homes
Bedrooms
5 bedrooms
Guide
From GBP 1,150,000
View development

Planning approved

Hilltop Park

Wokingham, Berkshire

Hilltop Park creates a generous new neighbourhood close to Wokingham, with walkable streets, pocket green spaces and family homes planned for long-term comfort.

Homes
22 family homes
Bedrooms
3, 4 and 5 bedrooms
Guide
Launch expected autumn 2026
